age: In limestones on E side of Wheeler Amphitheater

Localities (The formations are exposed in a U with the bottom facing West in the Wheeler Amphitheater and also in outcrops between Marjum pass and the Wheeler Amphitheater. They are also exposed in the cliffs on the South side of Marjum Pass).

The U-Dig Trilobite quarry is adjacent to a road extending into the South side of the Amphitheater. This site is probably in the general area of the sites formerly describes as 'Antelope Spring' and the 'Old CCC Camp'
